ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., chest, waist, hip) */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* Numeric value for the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code (e.g., FR, DE, US, UK) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size being converted */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the size is applicable */,
  "size_range" TEXT /* Size range for the country (e.g., 32-34, 36) */,
  "conversion_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or details about the conversion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subcategory the product belongs to */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES product_subcategories ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the specified size */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit for the specific product size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address where the order will be shipped */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Address for billing purposes */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the specified size */,
  "price_per_unit" REAL /* Price of each unit in the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Primary address of the customer */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Language preference for communication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was posted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being recommended */,
  "recommended_product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended product */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_recommended_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being paid for */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid in the transaction */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction identifier from the payment gateway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used (e.g., UPS, USPS) */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was made */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the subcategory belongs to */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_subcategories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)
